name: Better Scrambled Eggs
description: A creamy scrambled egg dish made by whisking eggs with half-and-half and cooking them over moderate heat in a buttered skillet.
instructions: Place butter on medium to large cast iron skillet.
Preheat skillet just below medium heat until butter has melted and started to bubble.
In a non-reactive bowl, whisk together eggs, half-and-half, salt, and pepper until mixture is smooth.
Once skillet has preheated, add egg mixture.
Using a wooden spoon or spatula, gently stir eggs as they cook to scramble.
Remove from heat when eggs are mostly cooked and just slightly runny.
Continue to stir until just finished.
Serve immediately, perhaps with bacon or on top of a buttermilk biscuit.
